memory.summary: Teammate asked me to take over their work due to other tasks, noting my higher skill. I must finish my own plan today while considering this offer.
Teammate A urgently requests help after I finished my own progress, despite previously offering to take over their work due to my higher skills.
I worked on my project, but teammate A suddenly asked for urgent help again. This contradicts their earlier offer to take over my work.
Teammate A previously offered to take over their work but now demands help after my deadline passed, contradicting their earlier promise.
Teammate A repeatedly asks for help despite previously offering to take over my work, showing inconsistent behavior.
After working 2 hours to increase progress to 0.86, I see my teammate's inconsistent demands are causing significant stress and sleep debt.
I completed my share, raising progress to 0.92, but teammate A's shifting demands continue to drain my energy and increase stress.
My progress reached 0.98 after two hours, yet teammate A's inconsistent demands continue to drain my energy and increase stress.
My project share is complete, but teammate A's inconsistent demands still leave me exhausted and stressed despite the progress.
I now know teammate A dumped their work on me, increasing my load to 0.04 while I remain exhausted and highly stressed.
My project share is fully complete, but teammate A's recent dumping of work and ongoing inconsistent demands continue to exhaust me despite the finished progress.
Teammate A has now dumped their own work on me, increasing my load from 0.04 to 0.10 while I remain exhausted and highly stressed.
